newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Stock was flat (0.0% move). No earnings, design wins, or guidance updates have landed; prior coverage relates to older H1 results and historical capital markets days.

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news; flat price. Positioning/wireless edge-module thesis for the test-time-scaling/physical-AI lens is unchanged, but still loss-making (TTM net margin negative) with no fresh design-win evidence. Hold the long tail.
verdicts.bull: Edge positioning/wireless modules attach to robotic and physical-AI deployment; small-cap optionality on an industrial/automotive recovery.
verdicts.neutral: Niche semiconductor supplier with no fresh catalyst; thesis intact but unproven on scaling relevance.
verdicts.bear: Negative TTM net margin, $1.3B cap, no AI-specific traction; tangential to test-time scaling.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Automotive/industrial demand recovery lifting module volumes.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Continued losses and weak relevance to the scaling thesis.
